_comment: Copy this file to personal-info.json and fill in your details. personal-info.json is gitignored — never commit it.

contact._comment: Usually the same as identity.email and identity.phone

experience_summary._comment: years_total: your total years of professional experience
experience_summary.bio_short: One paragraph bio used for cover letter intros and application summaries.

work_experience._comment: Add one object per job. Repeat as needed.
work_experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Led development of X, resulting in Y
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver Z

_relocation_note: List of cities/metros you are open to relocating to. Leave empty if not open to relocation.

demographics_default._comment: Used for EEO forms. Fill in your actual values, or leave blank to skip optional fields.
demographics_default.veteran_status: I am not a protected veteran
demographics_default.disability_status: I do not have a disability

common_form_answers._comment: Freeform answers for common ATS questions.
common_form_answers.cover_letter_short: I am excited about this opportunity and believe my background in X makes me a strong fit.

_optional_field_note: skip = leave blank when optional; fill = try to fill optional fields
_cover_letter_policy_note: generate = LLM-generated per role; default = use cover_letter_default string below

files._comment: Paths to your resume files. Relative to the agents/job-search/ directory.
